{{/* Reference landing (product: reference). Renders the page body, then a card per CRD grouped by site.Data.apigroups. Cards link to the generated per-type pages and pull their summary from the page Description, so new CRDs appear here once they're added to a group. */}} {{ .Content }} {{ range site.Data.apigroups.groups }}

{{ .title }}

{{ with .description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ $group := . }} {{ range $group.kinds }} {{ $k := . }} {{ range $plural, $dir := site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ $crd := $dir.definition }} {{ if and $crd (eq $crd.spec.names.kind $k) }} {{ $page := site.GetPage (printf "/reference/%s" $plural) }} {{ with $page }} {{ $k }} {{ with .Description }}{{ . }}{{ end }} → {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
